Enumeration Case# kIOAudioEngineRunning

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.1+

```
kIOAudioEngineRunning = 1
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/ioaudioenginestate/kioaudioenginerunning#discussion)

The IOAudioEngine is currently running - it is transferring data to or from the device.
